typora.settings: Default Whitespace / LineBreak settings; not modified during capture

initialCaret.attemptedPlacement: visual click between Before and After

notes: Blocked: GUI automation could not deterministically place the caret on the whitespace-only source line. A visual click between the rendered lines placed the caret in the following visible word, so this failed capture must not be used as a Typora oracle expectation.

blockedReview.reason:

After`, but the failed click-test source is `Before

A

FM_SENTINEL_CLICK_WS_ENTERfter`. Enter and the sentinel landed after the first visible character of `After`; the record also has no screenshot and uses a click-test sentinel that differs from the matrix sentinel.
attemptedMethods: Re-read the case matrix target offset, failed capture JSON, and `tmp/typora-oracle-click-test/whitespace-click-test.md`.
Checked whether saved source alone proves the action happened on the whitespace-only source line; it proves the opposite.
nextManualSteps: Create a fresh `Before\n   \nAfter` fixture and capture a screenshot with the caret visibly on the whitespace-only line before pressing Enter.
Press Enter, insert the matrix sentinel `FM_SENTINEL_WS_ENTER`, save, and keep the exact saved source.
Promote only if the source and screenshot jointly prove the action began on the whitespace-only line.
